title: ModalDynamics
description: ModalDynamics: General modal dynamics result of the structure.

Frequency.description: Property has a quantity of type Frequency measured in [Hz].

ModalMass.description: Property has a quantity of type Mass measured in [kg].

ModalStiffness.description: Property has a quantity of type ForcePerUnitLength measured in [N/m].

MassRatioX.description: Property has a quantity of type Ratio measured in [-].

MassRatioY.description: Property has a quantity of type Ratio measured in [-].

MassRatioZ.description: Property has a quantity of type Ratio measured in [-].

InertiaRatioX.description: Property has a quantity of type Ratio measured in [-].

InertiaRatioY.description: Property has a quantity of type Ratio measured in [-].

InertiaRatioZ.description: Property has a quantity of type Ratio measured in [-].

ModeNumber.description: Positive index, starting at one. Only set for cases with modal outputs such as dynamic cases.

TimeStep.description: Time step for time history results.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
